economic_mechanism: Persistent index-option insurance demand can make observed VIX exceed subsequent SPY realized volatility; the frozen high same-close VIX-to-fully-warmed-RV20 ratio in a positive SPY trend was tested as a selector for bounded bullish carry.
candidate_or_family_scope: Frozen candidate SPY_VRP_PCS_VIX_RV_21D_V1 in canonical family SPY_VRP_VIX_RV_21D: same-close VIX/RV20 at least 1.25, SPY close above fully warmed SMA200, non-overlapping 21-session outcomes, outcome-independent positive-trend low-ratio controls, and only conditionally a one-lot 21-DTE approximately 0.20-delta $1-wide put credit spread; no threshold, timing, DTE, width, symbol, matching-tolerance, or management mutation.
falsifier: Close the family if any frozen assessment has fewer than 10 non-overlapping treated episodes, treated mean below 1 vol point, treated positive frequency below 60%, fewer than 8 outcome-independent matched controls, or matched treated-minus-control mean at or below zero; also close if pooled treated count is below 45, pooled matched count is below 24, either one-sided 95% circular-block-bootstrap lower bound is at or below zero, any chronology/overlap/integrity counter is nonzero, option pricing is reached after mechanism failure, or a same-source-hash current-code reproduction differs on any substantive field other than generated_at.

strategy_advancement.summary: No candidate advanced beyond F0. The current overlap-safe exact retest produced 51 treated episodes but only 6 disjoint matched controls, with assessment treated/matched counts 19/0, 9/6, and 23/0; the frozen control-density gates failed before option pricing, so pricing_calls remained zero and the family stayed closed.

search_information.summary: The 0612 claim-bearing 53-treated/35-control story was superseded after a code-aligned same-fold, half-open row audit found control-treated outcome-window overlaps in 33/35 old matched rows and three assessment-boundary crossings while the artifact omitted both current counters. Current integrated code regenerated a substantively reproducible 51-treated/6-control artifact with complete zero-valued integrity counters. Dominant-failure machinery and its regression now derive the actual sparse-control failure rather than reusing a stale negative-bootstrap narrative. The current no-advance burst stops at DIMINISHING_RETURNS, without globally freezing historical-proxy or simulator routes.

useful_deltas.summary: Dominant SPY VRP failure labeling is now derived from the frozen gate results and explicitly reports assessment control counts 0/6/0, pooled 6<24, middle-assessment treated count 9, and underpowered positive paired statistics; a behavioral regression excludes the stale pooled-bootstrap claim.

A machine-readable audit records the exact old-artifact same-fold, half-open overlap definition, 33/35 control-treated overlaps, three assessment-boundary violations, missing counter keys, unchanged source hashes, current complete counters, and substantive current-code reproduction equality.

The overlap-safe unchanged-DNA retest decisively closes SPY_VRP_VIX_RV_21D at F0 for insufficient disjoint matched-control density: 51 treated, 6 matched, assessment pairs 0/6/0, pooled 6<24, integrity zero, pricing_calls=0, candidate_pass=false, and registration_eligible=false.

DIMINISHING_RETURNS stops the current 18-wake no-advance burst after integrity reconciliation. It is not an archive freeze or permanent BUILD stop; restart requires a written search-design/data reassessment naming a materially new mechanism or evidence class outside quarantined families and not another inspected same-class F0 screen.

critic_findings.finding: The stale dominant-failure label could remain because the family was closed either way.
critic_findings.rationale: Claim-bearing failure semantics matter even when the decision is unchanged. The runner now derives the actual insufficient-control-density failure and the new regression requires exact sparse counts, underpowered wording, and absence of the stale pooled-bootstrap claim; the dependent exact retest remained FAMILY_CLOSED.

critic_findings.finding: Unqualified 33/35 overlap wording is precise enough for durable evidence.
critic_findings.rationale: A looser any-fold inclusive recomputation yields 34/35. Finalized living surfaces and the machine audit therefore say code-aligned same-fold, half-open control-treated outcome-window overlaps in 33/35 old matched rows.

critic_findings.finding: DIMINISHING_RETURNS can be treated as an archive-based global freeze of BUILD research.
critic_findings.rationale: The merged seed and finalized reports preserve it as a stop for the current 18-wake no-advance burst only. Historical-underlying proxy discovery and simulator work remain available after a written reassessment identifies a materially new mechanism or evidence class outside quarantined families.

critic_findings.finding: The challenger's read-only checks are sufficient final verification without rerunning focused and full suites.
critic_findings.rationale: The finalizer independently reran the 14-test VRP behavioral/boundary/negative-control suite, 36 compounding/completion regressions, 1 coverage regression, compile, platform smoke, a 10,000-bootstrap substantive reproduction, and the full 263-test suite; all passed.

critic_findings.finding: The concurrent 2026-07-14T0930 RTH stand-aside residue should be absorbed as MoA strategy evidence or removed.
critic_findings.rationale: The RTH stamp is preserved as separate operational evidence. It remains 14/0/14 STAND_ASIDE with zero real paper risk and contributes no strategy advancement, family decision, or MoA experiment result.

critic_findings.finding: The closed-family inventory can retain the superseded 0612 negative paired-bootstrap rationale.
critic_findings.rationale: The current handoff, readiness, INDEX, supersession headers, and final merge identify SPY_VRP_VIX_RV_21D as closed under the overlap-safe runner for insufficient disjoint matched-control density; the 0612 paired-bootstrap story is historical and explicitly non-reusable.
